plan_metadata.name: Feature LocalDebug Second Press F5 for Bot

steps.description: Click the "Teams Agents and Apps" option in the "New Project" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click the "General Teams Agent" option in the dropdown menu within the "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" dialog.
Click the "Simple Bot" option in the "Teams Capability" dropdown menu.
Click on the "JavaScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface at coordinates (288, 101).
Click the "Default folder" field in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select the path "/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects".
Click the "Close" (X) button at the top-right corner of the Microsoft Teams web application in the Chrome browser to close the tab.
Press the F1 key to open the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code while in a debugging workspace with an active terminal session.
Type the text 'Debug: Select and Start Debugging' into the Visual Studio Code command palette input box at the top of the interface.
Press the Enter key to select the "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" command in the Visual Studio Code command palette.
Type text 'Debug in Teams (Chrome)' into the top search bar of the Visual Studio Code Command Palette interface.
Press the Enter key to select the "Debug in Teams (Chrome)" launch configuration from the dropdown in Visual Studio Code's command palette.
Click the "Open" button in the app details popup for "vscuse_app_cmFk7local" within the Microsoft Teams web interface.
Click the "Open" button in the onboarding dialog for the "vscuse_app_cmfK7local" app within the Microsoft Teams web interface.
Click the red plus (+) button next to the "Type a message" input box in the Microsoft Teams web app chat interface to open the message attachment or compose options.
Type the text 'test' into the message input box at the bottom of a Microsoft Teams chat window titled 'vscuse_app_cmFk7local'.
Press the Enter key to send the message "test" from the chat input box in a Microsoft Teams web chat with the "vscuse_app_cmFk7local" bot.
